warning_rules: Send Telegram if SPY or QQQ closes down 2%+ or VIX spikes 15%+ from prior close.
Send Telegram if any core holding has a thesis-breaking filing, earnings miss, guidance cut, regulator action, or major accident.
Send Telegram if 10Y yield moves 15bp+ in one session and rate-sensitive quality names are under pressure.
Send Telegram if TSM, LLY, MSFT, CEG, ETN, ANET, VRTX, SMH, or key Malaysia names move 5%+ with verified news.
Send Telegram if SEC EDGAR publishes a relevant new 13F, S-1, 8-K, 6-K, or major insider/PTR filing tied to tracked names.

rules: Send the daily title digest every morning even when there is no urgent alert.
Put warning or critical items at the top with [WARNING] or [CRITICAL].
Include war/geopolitics, macro/rates, oil, gas, copper, broader commodities, FX, equities, portfolio names, Malaysia market, and major earnings or filings.
Keep each item to one title plus one short impact tag. No long article summaries in Telegram.
If the message is too long for Telegram, send the top digest and attach/link telegram-news.txt for the full list.
